products.title: Matte Canvas, Stretched, 1.25"
products.description:
Place your custom artwork, photos, or creative projects on a canvas you'll be proud to use. Each matte canvas comes with back hanging already included for convenient placement. The frame is made with profile radiata pine that is ethically sourced from renewable forests.

Please note: Sizes 30" x 60" (Vertical), 40" x 60" (Vertical), 60" x 30" (Horizontal), and 60" x 40" (Horizontal) - Domestic US, Canada, Spain, United Kingdom, Germany, and Australia shipping only.


.: Materials: cotton and polyester composite (canvas), pine wood (frame)
.: Comes in 60 different sizes (including vertical and horizontal orientations)
.: Horizontal, vertical and square options available
.: Soft rubber dots on bottom back corners for support
.: Back hanging included
.: Inner frame made with radiata pine sourced from renewable forests
.: Please note: Due to the production process of the canvases, please allow for slight size deviations with a tolerance +/- 1/8" (3.2mm)
.: Please note: Sizes 30" x 60" (Vertical), 40" x 60" (Vertical), 60" x 30" (Horizontal), and 60" x 40" (Horizontal) - Domestic US, Canada, Spain, United Kingdom, Germany and Australia shipping only

products.title: Moonlit Calla
products.description:
Bring quiet elegance into your space with Moonlit Calla, a refined botanical artwork inspired by the calm beauty of night gardens. The delicate curves and soft tones of the flower create a sense of balance and serenity, making it a perfect statement piece for living rooms, bedrooms, offices, or creative spaces.

Printed on high-quality canvas, this artwork adds a touch of modern gallery style while maintaining a warm, timeless aesthetic that complements both minimal and contemporary interiors.

Product Details

• 1.25″ (3.18 cm) thick poly-cotton blend canvas

• Canvas fabric weight: 10.15 +/- 0.74 oz./yd.² (344 g/m² +/- 25g/m²)

• Fade-resistant

• Hand-stretched over solid wood stretcher bars

• Mounting brackets included

• Blank product sourced from the US, Canada, Europe, UK, or Australia

products.title: Sage Halo – Modern Botanical Canvas
products.description:
Grounded elegance. Quiet presence. Timeless balance.

Sage Halo is a study in harmony — where soft botanical detail meets structured form. A luminous circular base anchors the composition, while a flowing ribbon of muted blush moves gracefully across the surface, creating depth and movement without overwhelming the space.

Set against a warm cocoa taupe background, the artwork feels both modern and organic — a perfect balance of softness and strength. The sage undertones bring calm sophistication, while the centered composition creates a sense of stability and refined symmetry.

Designed for curated interiors, Sage Halo elevates bedrooms, living spaces, and boutique-inspired environments with effortless warmth.

Sage Halo is not loud — it is intentional.

A quiet statement piece for spaces that value elegance in simplicity.

Product features

- Matte, glare-reducing coating with high-quality Greenguard Gold inks

- Stretched on renewable radiata pine frame with 1.25" profile

- Durable cotton-poly canvas printed with non-toxic latex inks

- Soft rubber dots on back plus included hanging hardware for stable display

- Available in multiple orientations and sizes; small tolerance in dimensions (+/- 1/8")

Care instructions

- If the canvas does gather any dust, you may wipe it off gently with a clean, damp cloth.

products.title: Blush Whisper – Modern Botanical Canvas
products.description:
Soft movement. Quiet elegance. Timeless warmth.

Blush Whisper captures the delicate harmony between flowing abstract form and subtle botanical detail. A gentle ribbon of blush glides across a warm taupe backdrop, accompanied by muted sage accents that evoke calm, balance, and refined femininity.

Designed to elevate contemporary interiors, this piece brings a sense of softness without losing presence. The composition breathes — allowing the negative space and organic flow to create a serene focal point that feels curated rather than decorative.

Perfect for living rooms, bedrooms, offices, or boutique-style spaces, Blush Whisper blends effortlessly with modern, minimalist, and neutral palettes.
